title: Sequence counter validation and tamper detection
description: Verify strict sequence validation and ciphertext tampering detection

steps.action: Send encrypted message with seq=1 again (replay)
In a new session, send seq=1 then seq=3 (gap)
In a new session, send message with tampered ciphertext payload
